bio: Kyle Becker is a UX strategist, researcher, and product designer that works as a freelance consultant with companies. Most of his work as a freelancer has been with small, early stage startups contracting directly, or subcontracting through design firms. In the past, he has worked with frog design, Yoma Bank, J.P. Morgan Onyx, and Crypto Research and Design Lab (CRADL). He has conducted user research in the US, El Salvador, Nigeria, Rwanda, Kenya, Indonesia, and Myanmar. In the past few years, much of his work has centered around AI, blockchain experiences, and emerging market finance.

commonly_confused_with.label: Kyle Becker (Fox News contributor)
commonly_confused_with.note: Different person — media commentator, not a UX designer or researcher.
